description: Immutable official Zanzibar (tz-znz) statute scope used by RuleSpec-TZ-ZNZ: the ZANMOD v1.1 tranche-1 instruments (Zanzibar VAT, excise, and the ZSSF contribution chain). Union-law surfaces (Income Tax Act Cap 332 chain, PSSN) are served by the tz releases and rulespec-tz. First Zanzibar cut; SOUTHMOD full-bundle program lane 1.
name: tz-znz-rulespec-2026-07-21
